  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30935204</id>
    <published>2026-07-20T07:35:29Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-20T07:35:29Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/tnypgb2jbqnq"/>
    <title>Fable 5 requiring usage credits on Max plans</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>07:35</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - Some Claude Code Max plan users were incorrectly prompted to use usage credits to access Fable 5, which is included in their plan. If you were affected, please restart Claude Code. </p></content>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30935011</id>
    <published>2026-07-20T10:57:20Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-20T10:57:20Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/hlt0yqp4lkww"/>
    <title>Elevated error rates for Opus 4.5</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>10:57</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>10:05</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>07:57</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>07:03</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30917941</id>
    <published>2026-07-17T19:43:35Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-17T19:43:35Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/g613ntyj2pwf"/>
    <title>Elevated errors across Fable 5</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>17</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:43</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This issue has been resolved, and Claude Fable 5 is available once again without usage credits, as expected. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>17</var>, <var data-var='time'>18:48</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - We have applied a fix to resolve the erroneous requirement for usage credits on Fable 5, and are monitoring to ensure no further issues. You may need to relaunch Claude.ai or Claude Code to restore access as expected. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>17</var>, <var data-var='time'>18:36</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - We are aware of an issue preventing users from selecting Claude Fable 5 within Claude.ai, Claude Code, and other surfaces, and are working to resolve this issue. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>17</var>, <var data-var='time'>18:32</var> UTC</s
